overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-lit downtown street in Night City. The player approaches and enters the NCART subway station, descending from the bustling street level into the underground transit facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown street with vehicle traffic

events.description: dark sedan vehicle passes by on the right side of the road
green sports car drives past on the road to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a multi-lane road, passing pedestrians and observing the neon cityscape

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall building covered with large illuminated advertisements and holographic displays
tall multi-head street lighting fixture with bright white lights
concrete pedestrian walkway with metal railings separating it from the road
multi-lane asphalt road with yellow dividing lines and moving traffic

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bustling Night City street at night, dominated by towering neon billboards and holographic advertisements. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk separated from the road by orange railings, while vehicles including a black sedan and green sports car pass by on the right. Sparse pedestrians walk along the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera.

events.description: NCART station entrance becomes visible ahead, marking the destination approach

agents.ego_description: walking toward the NCART station entrance while passing pedestrians on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the station entrance looking at a device

entered.detail: futuristic transit station entrance with large illuminated signage reading NCART Night City Area Rapid Transit
large cyan and yellow illuminated sign with NCART branding
automated ticket vending machines with glowing screens near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the NCART subway station entrance, where a large cyan and yellow neon sign illuminates the area. The environment becomes semi-covered as the station overhang provides shelter. Pedestrians are visible near the entrance, and the focus shifts from the open street to the transit station architecture.

events.description: enters the NCART station, transitioning from outdoor street to indoor transit facility
lighting shifts from mixed neon street lighting to artificial indoor station lighting

agents.ego_description: walking down the station stairs into the underground platform area

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading down to the platform level
low concrete ceiling with linear fluorescent lighting fixtures
illuminated vertical advertisement screens displaying various products

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the NCART station and begins descending the stairs into the underground facility. The environment becomes fully enclosed with artificial lighting replacing the outdoor neon glow. Advertisement posters line the walls as the camera moves down toward the platform level.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway station platform level with turnstiles

events.description: reaches the bottom of the stairs and transitions to walking on the station platform floor

agents.ego_description: walking through the station interior toward the platform turnstiles, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the turnstiles wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: automated entry gates with green indicator lights and warning signage
purple and yellow automated vending kiosk with illuminated product display
glowing cyan and orange directional arrows embedded in the polished floor
glass and metal platform barriers with green neon trim

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto the station platform level, featuring polished floors with glowing neon directional markings. The scene includes automated turnstiles with green lights, vending machines, and platform gates in the distance. The environment is fully enclosed with artificial lighting and a sparse crowd of pedestrians moving through the transit area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, neon-drenched city street into the enclosed depths of an underground transit station. It begins by moving along a concrete sidewalk beneath towering holographic advertisements, passing orange railings and flowing traffic. As the camera approaches the NCART subway entrance, the open street gives way to a semi-covered overhang illuminated by a large cyan and yellow neon sign. The scene then shifts as the camera descends a flight of stairs, leaving the outdoor glow behind for an enclosed environment of artificial lighting and wall-mounted posters. Finally, the movement emerges onto the station platform, where the surroundings transition into a polished interior featuring glowing directional markings, automated turnstiles, and distant platform gates.
